hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The character starts in the top-left corner facing down

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: walk(3) moves forward 3 steps — count the empty cells in each corridor

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use turnLeft() or turnRight() to change direction at corners

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Plan your path first: count how many steps each straight section needs
